column1: Riokaii: now idk what to play lol
Mezmor: sounds like a wonderful position to be in!
Mezmor: i have at least three things i REALLY want to play so you should probably play one of those
Mezmor: (i wont tell you what they are)
Riokaii: i do not understand so i will fumble in the dark
Mezmor: im down to 9h already wtf fugma
Riokaii: have u been making malkovich comments?
Mezmor: i don't know what those are, i only malkovich from the hit movie: being jon malkovich
Riokaii: if u click ""chat"" in the bottom left its literally that from the movie
Riokaii: you comment your internal thoughts and only revealed after game
Riokaii: i havent been doing it either i was just curious
Mezmor: i should do that tbh, but no
Mezmor: i usually look at a position and remember how i felt at the time and then i remember from there
Mezmor: oh neat i do indeed see that
Mezmor: maybe ill start doing that
Mezmor: should make for a fun review
Mezmor: ok yea im spamming malkovich comments now
Riokaii: ppl used to do them as forum threads, is cool feature
Mezmor: in b4 i write a dissertation and accidentally post it to chat instead
Riokaii: I think im supposed to stand up from kick but yolo we invent new joseki here
Riokaii: I have no idea how to use aji from these two stones
Mezmor: im so scared of g3
Mezmor: f12 is also highly desirable
Mezmor: g18 concerns me slightly? but not extremely
Riokaii: Felt like a good result for me on topside
Mezmor: h13 is a great ramp into center, my middle moyo is likely fucked
Mezmor: tengen might actually be a decent play for me, but then im doing battle on two sides: g13 and q6-r8 influence

Riokaii: Top left moves feel weird idk what to play up there, im somewhat concerned for my stick eventually but it is out to center, I decided to take the base from rightside group to delay having to figure it out but this knights move is good
Mezmor: d10 looks decent for me, i can threaten that side while building good influence
Mezmor: maybe its like j10 instead of tengen, idfk
Riokaii: i wanted to splitting attack the right and top groups but i dont feel like there is a good separating move now and the top group is already semi alive
Riokaii: his bottom side is thin but invading it seems hard, I wanted to build the left but he's reducing it already which makes it less appetizing
Riokaii: think i missed an opportunity to play F15
Riokaii: from his perspective, playing a move on the bottom feels big at any point. The top left corner is maybe a lil thin too? but what could his 3rd urgent/big move be?
Riokaii: maybe hes worried about right or top groups?
Riokaii: idk what move is the key point to attack either/both of them though hmm
C[Mezmor: i think that attack is a bit slow, the h13-h15 shape is already really dense, this just makes it too dense
Mezmor: i was eyeing f12 like i said earlier but now thats not doable. however, it opens up the d10 attack a bit better
Mezmor: i think d10 at this point is too fast, the density of g13 would obliterate the frail extension of d10
Mezmor: so i need something slower
Mezmor: but still does the same ""attack left but also escape and build influence on the right""
Mezmor: d13, d12, e13 all look good
Mezmor: i think f13 is bait
C[Mezmor: i think thats the wrong side, i think d13 shoulder hit still better
Mezmor: this is... kinda boring actually
Mezmor: i dont even need to respond
Mezmor: you know... now that i look at that h13 density again.......
Mezmor: its not as safe as we think......
Mezmor: i think i can fend off any attachments in the f12 region
Mezmor: do i just... go for the kill????
C[Mezmor: this might be too obvious
Mezmor: i wonder if i had played f12 or f10 or h10 it would make the attack on h13 less obvious
Mezmor: the attack also helps me connect the k15 group
Mezmor: and the group on the right is safe-ish via o12
Mezmor: i think im behind by a few points still tbh
Mezmor: but im not unhappy with this position
Mezmor: I think I lost too much with the shoddy s15 approach
C[Mezmor: i think this just... doesnt cut...?
Mezmor: my intuition is that e15 is perfectl ysafe
Mezmor: we lose g14 potentially but ... who cares?
Mezmor: man now i have to play out all the variations of e15 because i doub tmyself
Mezmor: ending the variation with f12 is not too shabby
Mezmor: h13 fightin for its life
C[Mezmor: pls hold, i have raid, ty
Mezmor: eyeing something in the f11 to h10 region
Mezmor: maybe c13 is a decent fighting move?
Mezmor: g11 looks nice but it opens up the k12 movement too easily
Mezmor: h10 makes l11 look nice
C[Mezmor: fuck, i went fishing when my house was on fire T_T
Mezmor: i should listen to myself and fix aji but ugh it sso SLOOWWW
C[Riokaii: trying to resist just connecting passively by destroying center moyo and helping my reduction stones possibly in the future
Riokaii: hes still quite thin on the bottom I can maybe attack if I keep him split from connecting to the upper right stones
C[Mezmor: stuck between cleaning up my p2-p5 aji or trying to enclose L6
Mezmor: L8 or m7 looks nice
Mezmor: maybe even m5, but i think thats too slow
Mezmor: im gonna play it safe at the expense of potential speed
Mezmor: i think this probably a minus point situation
Mezmor: i play for SPEED and OTHER STUFF and just let this be the complexity that it is
C[Riokaii: I was more worried about him attacking my L4 and L6 stones. Seems i scared him into defending his group first, this move feels slow/passive from him imo
C[Mezmor: this is a fun one
Mezmor: i can run in either direction
Mezmor: so K7 is likely very alive, J10, G5, maybe even the N6 blob
Mezmor: J7 looks way worse off than K7 though lol
Mezmor: but i feel like playing into the mess a bit
Mezmor: i think im dense enough on both sides here that i can win any conflict down here
Riokaii: what the fuck is this
C[Mezmor: i bet he expected me to play k8
Mezmor: is l7 a tesuji idk
C[Mezmor: m7 is a ladder i win
C[Mezmor: oh man he black is not looking nice here
C[Mezmor: between j9 and k9 for me
Riokaii: now its his choice of which cut(s) he wants
Mezmor: k9 feels a bit more stable
Mezmor: and i can still connect to j10 just fine
Riokaii: i think i have to be willing to allow some tail to be cut off in exchange for living, i dont have as good of running options as I thought, top feels only reasonable one
C[Mezmor: my cut is giga safe
Mezmor: black goes round the outside, round the outside
Mezmor: but i count: 4 possible places to cut safely
Mezmor: the cuts are less obvious now
Mezmor: i think i need to fake one to build influence then cut
Mezmor: N6 into M8 is the kneejerk plan
C[Mezmor: and im just gonna not think about it too much (probably bad)
C[Mezmor: i think im still losing but this fight is not looking good for B (i think?)
Mezmor: has to be n5 here
Mezmor: that thing is fightin for its life
Mezmor: i guess maybe f5 is interesting?
Mezmor: there's definitely an angle here where B uses the ""lost"" stones at F3 and E4 to save something here
Mezmor: i dont know that its enough either way... but maybe...
Mezmor: (i still think W loses overall lmao)
C[Mezmor: wait did i miscount my liberties

Riokaii: metagame psychological trick plays now eh?
Mezmor: i am not that smart

C[Riokaii: Ive found like 5 different ko's at various points in this process
Riokaii: I think he's weak enough that i can capturing race something eventually and live but its very precise
Riokaii: he has to take care of like 2 or 3 groups at once so i just need to keep finding moves with double threats
C[Mezmor: now im the one fighting for my life
Mezmor: how the turnings have been tabled
C[Mezmor: breaking news, my cut could NOT go in any direction
Mezmor: still struggling to keep that alive i think
Mezmor: depending on eye status in the f9-j9 regions
Mezmor: if im counting this right, our liberties are even?
Mezmor: j11 stops me from getting ahead on the count
Mezmor: my first game back and im in a huge ko to decide the match????
Mezmor: h3 was huge for being ahead on the count
Mezmor: and also the eye status thing i wrote earlier in chat by accident
Mezmor: i hate that im going to have to decide what sacrifices to make in the ko fight
Mezmor: i guess i need to start looking around now
Mezmor: there is nothing i can play that is nearly threatening enough in the bottom right
Mezmor: i think , kind of not really
Mezmor: the top right seems like the flimsiest structure
Mezmor: top right: p15, o16, p17
Mezmor: top left idk if f14 is threatening enough
Mezmor: bottom left i gravitate towards b3
Mezmor: even pushing through b14 c13 area seems not threatening enough
Mezmor: K11 wouldnt work because thats part of the ko
Mezmor: maybe S7 or R7 is like, threatening enough?
Mezmor: connect + monkey tail to s2 to kill perhaps
Mezmor: r9 or s9 is not threatening enough
Mezmor: the top right structure is not alive until it connects things
Mezmor: that m19 through p16 shape is not as strong as it seems
Mezmor: ok lets say i play out the p15 o15 o16 line
Mezmor: if the q17 shape dies, and it connects, im hosed
Mezmor: so i need to keep that alive somehow, and attack top left of teh shape
Mezmor: fuck i have no idea which one
Mezmor: i guess i have to read it out :|
Mezmor: m18 is already a dead eye
Mezmor: it cant connect to j17
Mezmor: i think i can kill the entirety of the top right
Mezmor: does that make up for my lost ko though...?
Mezmor: if he goes for it?
Mezmor: i have no idea how to count this

Mezmor: oh no its the same ko anyway
